"[50] [Appended, 12:10:10] [3] [12:04:28 GMT-07:00 15 Apr 2026] (707) 952-0101 has entered the chat[12:04:28 GMT-07:00 15 Apr 2026] (707) 952-0101: A user is requesting emergency services from an Apple device via satellite. Transmit and receive times may be longer than for cellular SMS. User responses may be delayed due to satellite movements.The user CANNOT MAKE OR RECEIVE A VOICE CALL because they are outside cellular coverage.At 07:03PM UTC, A USER requested emergency services near these coordinates: Latitude 41.6590 (N), Longitude -124.1160 (W).[12:04:28 GMT-07:00 15 Apr 2026] (707) 952-0101: This request is for ME.The specific emergency is VEHICLE CRASH.NO ONE is trapped.The person in need IS NOT injured.The user's iPhone has its region set to UNITED STATES. The user's iPhone has its default language set to ENGLISH.PSAP systems may not render emojis/special characters correctly. Return messages will not be affected.Two-way text with the user is now available.[12:04:28 GMT-07:00 15 Apr 2026] (707) 952-0101: Responders may need to search an area extending at least 40 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user.The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is 272 meters. Responders may need to search 30 meters above and below this level for a 95% chance of finding the user.Enhanced Emergency Data may be available. QUERY ADDITIONAL DATA!The user's device battery state is 61-100%. Their verified phone number is +17079520101.The user requests help with a CAR OR VEHICLE ISSUE emergency.[12:05:54 GMT-07:00 15 Apr 2026] Amy Sells has entered the chat[12:05:54 GMT-07:00 15 Apr 2026] Amy Sells: 911 EMERGENCY ARE YOU INVOLVED IN A TRAFFIC ACCIDENT Call initiated: 12:04:28 GMT-07:00 15 Apr 2026Phone number: (707) 952-0101"
